key_sentences.english: A business trip to Beijing requires applying for a visa in advance and taking an early flight.

grammar_points.title: 马上 — Right away / About to happen
grammar_points.explanation:
马上 expresses that something is about to happen very soon or must be done immediately. Three key patterns:

1. 马上 + 动词 — An action is imminent
• 飞机马上起飞，请坐好。(The plane is about to take off, please be seated.)
• 我马上出发。(I am leaving right away.)

2. 马上就要 + 动词 + 了 — Entering a new state very soon
• 航班马上就要降落了。(The flight is about to land.)
• 他们马上就要出发了。(They are about to set off.)

3. 立刻/马上 — Emphasising instant response
• 请马上联系导游！(Please contact the tour guide immediately!)
• 发现迷路后，要立刻向人问路。(Upon getting lost, ask for directions immediately.)

examples.chinese: 航班马上就要起飞了，请系好安全带。
examples.pinyin: háng bān mǎ shàng jiù yào qǐ fēi le qǐng jì hǎo ān quán dài
examples.english: The flight is about to take off; please fasten your seatbelt.

examples.chinese: 出发时间到了，我们马上走。
examples.pinyin: chū fā shí jiān dào le wǒ men mǎ shàng zǒu
examples.english: It is time to depart; we are leaving right away.

examples.chinese: 发现迷路后，要立刻马上寻求帮助。
examples.pinyin: fā xiàn mí lù hòu yào lì kè mǎ shàng xún qiú bāng zhù
examples.english: Upon getting lost, seek help immediately.

options: 我们马上就要出发了，行李都准备好了吗？
我们出发马上了，行李准备好吗？
马上我们了，出发行李准备。
行李马上出发，我们准备好了。
option_pinyin: wǒ men mǎ shàng jiù yào chū fā le xíng lǐ dōu zhǔn bèi hǎo le ma

mini_exercises.question: 马上 is used to express...
mini_exercises.correct: That an action or state change is about to happen immediately
options: That an action or state change is about to happen immediately
That an action happened a long time ago
That someone has a regular habit
That two actions happen at exactly the same time

grammar_points.title: 安排 — To arrange / To schedule (A 安排 B to do sth)
grammar_points.explanation:
安排 means to organise, schedule, or arrange something. The key structure is:

A + 安排 + B + 动词 + (something)
A arranges for B to do something.

• 导游安排大家参观了著名景点。
  (The tour guide arranged for everyone to visit famous attractions.)
• 公司安排他出差去北京。
  (The company arranged for him to go on a business trip to Beijing.)

安排 can also be used with a noun object:
• 我们要提前安排旅行计划。
  (We need to arrange the travel plan in advance.)
• 他安排好了所有的签证手续。
  (He arranged all the visa procedures.)

examples.chinese: 导游安排大家参观了当地的著名景点。
examples.pinyin: dǎo yóu ān pái dà jiā cān guān liǎo dàng dì de zhù míng jǐng diǎn
examples.english: The tour guide arranged for everyone to visit the local famous attractions.

examples.chinese: 公司安排他出差，处理重要业务。
examples.pinyin: gōng sī ān pái tā chū chāi chǔ lǐ zhòng yào yè wù
examples.english: The company arranged for him to go on a business trip to handle important business.

examples.chinese: 出发前，她安排好了所有的签证和手续。
examples.pinyin: chū fā qián tā ān pái hǎo le suǒ yǒu de qiān zhèng hé shǒu xù
examples.english: Before departure, she arranged all the visas and formalities.

options: 他安排同事去机场接客户。

option_pinyin: tā ān pái tóng shì qù jī chǎng jiē kè hù

mini_exercises.correct: A organises or schedules for B to do something

A and B do something at the same time
B teaches A how to do something

grammar_points.title: 推迟 — To postpone / To delay
grammar_points.explanation: 推迟 means to put something off to a later time. It is typically used with activities, events, or plans. Structure: Subject + 把 + plan + 推迟 + (到 + new time) / or Subject + 推迟 + verb phrase. 会议推迟到下周了 - The meeting has been postponed to next week. / 他们推迟了出发时间 - They delayed the departure time.

examples.chinese: 由于天气原因，航班被推迟了两个小时。
examples.pinyin: Yóu yú tiān qì yuán yīn, háng bān bèi tuī chí le liǎng gè xiǎo shí.
examples.english: Due to weather conditions, the flight was delayed by two hours.

examples.chinese: 他们把旅行计划推迟到下个月，等签证办好再出发。
examples.pinyin: Tā men bǎ lǚ xíng jì huà tuī chí dào xià gè yuè, děng qiān zhèng bàn hǎo zài chū fā.
examples.english: They postponed their travel plan to next month, waiting until the visa is ready before departing.

exercises.question: 因为导游生病了，这次旅游只能 _____ 了。
Choose the correct use of 推迟.
option_pinyin: Huì yì tuī chí dào xià zhōu jǔ xíng.
Tuī chí huì yì dào xià zhōu jǔ xíng.
Huì yì dào xià zhōu tuī chí jǔ xíng.
Tuī chí dào xià zhōu, huì yì jǔ xíng.

exercises.question: 他没来得及申请签证，所以只好把出差 _____ 了。
Which sentence uses 推迟 correctly?
exercises.correct: 因为天气原因，比赛被推迟到下周了。
options: 因为天气原因，比赛被推迟到下周了。
因为天气原因，推迟比赛被到下周了。
因为天气原因，到下周被推迟比赛了。
因为天气原因，比赛到下周被了推迟。
option_pinyin: bǎ jì huà tuī chí dào xià zhōu
tuī chí bǎ jì huà dào xià zhōu
dào xià zhōu bǎ tuī chí jì huà
jì huà bǎ dào xià zhōu tuī chí

mini_exercises.question: 推迟 means...
mini_exercises.correct: To postpone or delay something to a later time
options: To postpone or delay something to a later time
To complete something ahead of schedule

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Due to the rain, the outdoor event was postponed.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 由于下雨，户外活动被___了。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 由于下雨，户外活动被___了。
mini_exercises.question_english: Due to the rain, the outdoor event was postponed.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 推迟?
mini_exercises.correct: 由于签证还没办好，他们把出发日期推迟了。
options: 由于签证还没办好，他们把出发日期推迟了。
由于签证还没办好，推迟他们把出发日期了。
他们由于推迟，签证还没办好出发日期。
推迟由于签证，他们出发日期还没办好。
option_pinyin: yóu yú qiān zhèng hái méi bàn hǎo tā men bǎ chū fā rì qī tuī chí le
yóu yú qiān zhèng hái méi bàn hǎo tuī chí tā men bǎ chū fā rì qī le
tā men yóu yú tuī chí qiān zhèng hái méi bàn hǎo chū fā rì qī
tuī chí yóu yú qiān zhèng tā men chū fā rì qī hái méi bàn hǎo

culture_notes.title: China's High-Speed Rail — The World's Largest Network
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国高铁——世界最大铁路网
culture_notes.content: China operates the world's largest high-speed rail (高铁, gāo tiě) network, spanning over 40,000 kilometres. Trains such as the 复兴号 (Fùxīng Hào, 'Rejuvenation') reach speeds of up to 350 km/h, connecting major cities across the country in hours rather than days. The network has transformed domestic travel, often making high-speed rail a faster and more convenient alternative to flying for distances under 1,000 km. Passengers appreciate the spacious seats, punctuality, and city-centre stations that eliminate the need for long airport commutes. The expansion of 高铁 reflects China's broader push for modern infrastructure and has become a source of national pride.

idioms.english: Have a smooth journey (a common farewell to travellers)

quiz.question: What does 出差 mean?
quiz.correct: To go on a business trip
options: To go on a business trip

quiz.question: What does 顺便 mean in a sentence?
quiz.correct: While you're at it; doing something extra in passing
options: While you're at it; doing something extra in passing
In order to achieve a goal

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 签证还没办，我们 _____ 赶上这次旅行了。
Choose the correct sentence using 推迟.
quiz.correct: 由于天气，航班被推迟了。
options: 由于天气，航班被推迟了。
由于天气，航班推迟被了。
航班由于天气，推迟被了。
航班推迟，由于天气被了。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 旅行计划 mean?
Fill in the blank: 去机场前，他 _____ 在银行取了钱。
Which phrase means 'to apply for a visa'?
China's high-speed train 复兴号 can reach a speed of up to:
What does the phrase 出差归来 mean?
quiz.correct: To return from a business trip
options: To return from a business trip
To leave on a business trip
To get lost on a trip

quiz.question: Which grammar pattern means 'while you're at it'?
Fill in: 出发前，他认真准备了签证和 _____。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 您好，我的航班是CA302，请问还来得及办理登机手续吗？
lines.pinyin: Nín hǎo, wǒ de háng bān shì CA302, qǐng wèn hái lái de jí bàn lǐ dēng jī shǒu xù ma?
lines.english: Hello, my flight is CA302. Is there still time to check in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 来得及，还有四十分钟。请把您的登机牌和护照给我看一下。
lines.pinyin: Lái de jí, hái yǒu sì shí fēn zhōng. Qǐng bǎ nín de dēng jī pái hé hù zhào gěi wǒ kàn yí xià.
lines.english: Yes, there are still forty minutes. Please show me your boarding pass and passport.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好的，给您。我这次是出差，签证是公司帮我申请的。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, gěi nín. Wǒ zhè cì shì chū chāi, qiān zhèng shì gōng sī bāng wǒ shēn qǐng de.
lines.english: Here you are. I'm on a business trip this time; the company applied for the visa on my behalf.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 明白了。请问您有几件行李要托运？
lines.pinyin: Míng bai le. Qǐng wèn nín yǒu jǐ jiàn xíng li yào tuō yùn?
lines.english: I see. How many bags would you like to check in?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 只有一件。对了，我想顺便问一下，飞机会准时出发吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu yí jiàn. Duì le, wǒ xiǎng shùn biàn wèn yí xià, fēi jī huì zhǔn shí chū fā ma?
lines.english: Just one. By the way, I'd like to ask — will the plane depart on time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 目前没有推迟，预计准时起飞。祝您旅行顺利！
lines.pinyin: Mù qián méi yǒu tuī chí, yù jì zhǔn shí qǐ fēi. Zhù nín lǚ xíng shùn lì!
lines.english: There are no delays at the moment; it is expected to take off on time. Have a smooth trip!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了，谢谢您！希望能顺利降落，平安抵达。
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xiè xie nín! Xī wàng néng shùn lì jiàng luò, píng ān dǐ dá.
lines.english: Great, thank you! I hope we land safely and arrive without any problems.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 打扰一下，我好像迷路了。请问大使馆怎么走？
lines.pinyin: Dǎ rǎo yí xià, wǒ hǎo xiàng mí lù le. Qǐng wèn dà shǐ guǎn zěn me zǒu?
lines.english: Excuse me, I think I'm lost. How do I get to the embassy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 大使馆在高速公路旁边，从这里走大概二十分钟。
lines.pinyin: Dà shǐ guǎn zài gāo sù gōng lù páng biān, cóng zhè lǐ zǒu dà gài èr shí fēn zhōng.
lines.english: The embassy is next to the highway; it's about a twenty-minute walk from here.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我乘坐地铁来的，没想到出站口找错了，就迷路了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ chéng zuò dì tiě lái de, méi xiǎng dào chū zhàn kǒu zhǎo cuò le, jiù mí lù le.
lines.english: I came by subway but accidentally took the wrong exit and got lost.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没关系。你可以先坐公共汽车到高速公路出口，再步行五分钟。
lines.pinyin: Méi guān xi. Nǐ kě yǐ xiān zuò gōng gòng qì chē dào gāo sù gōng lù chū kǒu, zài bù xíng wǔ fēn zhōng.
lines.english: No problem. You can take a bus to the highway exit and then walk five minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我是来申请旅行签证的，导游说要带很多证明文件。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shì lái shēn qǐng lǚ xíng qiān zhèng de, dǎo yóu shuō yào dài hěn duō zhèng míng wén jiàn.
lines.english: I'm here to apply for a travel visa; the tour guide said I need to bring many supporting documents.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那你要抓紧时间，大使馆下午五点关门，来不及的话就要明天再来了。
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ yào zhuā jǐn shí jiān, dà shǐ guǎn xià wǔ wǔ diǎn guān mén, lái bù jí de huà jiù yào míng tiān zài lái le.
lines.english: Then you should hurry; the embassy closes at 5 p.m. If you run out of time, you'll have to come back tomorrow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢您！我这就出发，希望还来得及！
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nín! Wǒ zhè jiù chū fā, xī wàng hái lái de jí!
lines.english: Thank you! I'll head off right now — I hope there's still time!
